mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM COUNSEL_INFO
AND counsel_writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND DATE_FORMAT(counsel_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{searchKeyword}
AND counsel_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (counsel_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR counsel_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY seq_counsel DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COUNSEL_INFO (counsel_title, counsel_writer, counsel_content, counsel_date) VALUES (#{counsel_title}, #{counsel_writer}, #{counsel_content}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE COUNSEL_INFO SET counsel_title = #{counsel_title}, counsel_content = #{counsel_content}, modify_id = #{modify_id}, modify_date = NOW() WHERE seq_counsel = #{seq_counsel}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM COUNSEL_COMMENT WHERE seq_counsel = #{seq_counsel} ORDER BY comment_date ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT NEXTVAL(seq_counsel_comment)
INSERT INTO COUNSEL_COMMENT (seq_comment, seq_counsel, comment_content, comment_writer) VALUES (#{seq_comment}, #{seq_counsel}, #{comment_content}, #{comment_writer})
mapper.update:
UPDATE COUNSEL_INFO SET counsel_content = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE( counsel_content, '건성', '*****'), '찌질', '*****'), '말투', '*****'), '뻔뻔', '*****'), '싸가지', '*****')
WHERE counsel_content LIKE '%건성%' OR counsel_content LIKE '%찌질%' OR counsel_content LIKE '%말투%' OR counsel_content LIKE '%뻔뻔%' OR counsel_content LIKE '%싸가지%'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM COUNSEL_INFO WHERE counsel_date <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY)
